title: 为 OpenRouter 请求添加指数退避重试
description: 当前 pi_agent_openrouter.py 中，OpenRouter 返回 429/502/503 时直接包装成 StreamErrorEvent 抛给用户，不重试。需要在 _pump_openrouter_stream 调用层添加指数退避重试逻辑，覆盖 429（rate limit）、502/503/504（网关错误）场景，最大重试 3 次，首次等待 1s，指数增长，加 jitter。
close_reason: 已实现 _pump_with_retry，覆盖 429/502/503/504 及网络异常，指数退避+jitter，支持 Retry-After header，10 tests 通过

title: 修复 Agent 工具调用前文本被隐藏
description:
当前 PiAgentRuntime 在同一轮 assistant message 既包含普通文本又包含 tool_call 时，会把 text_deltas 记录为 trace.tool.preamble_suppressed，但不会通过 SSE 发给前端，导致用户看到的 Agent 回复缺失一部分内容。

证据：backend/app/runtime/pi_agent_runtime.py:393 在 tool_calls 存在且 text_deltas 非空时只调用 _trace_tool_preamble_suppressed。后端日志中也出现 trace.tool.preamble_suppressed，例如模型先说“我来帮这个项目简介精简一下...”随后调用 update_overview，但这段话没有显示在前端。

期望：ReAct 工具调用轮次中，模型在 tool_call 前产生的普通文本也应按正常 assistant 文本流式发送给前端；工具调用事件继续按现有 tool_pending/confirmation 流程发送。

验收：
1. 当模型同一轮输出 preamble 文本并调用工具时，前端能看到该文本。
2. 后端不再把这类文本仅作为 suppressed trace 处理。
3. 保持每轮最多执行一个实际工具调用的 ReAct 行为不变。
4. 添加或更新覆盖该行为的后端测试。
close_reason: Completed: tool-call preamble text now streams to the frontend before the tool pending event, with regression coverage.

title: Remove resume stop guard
description: Delete Resume Agent stop guard that hides or replaces model no-tool text. Model output should surface normally; tool calls remain executed through the ReAct loop.
close_reason: Deleted Resume Agent stop guard, retry/fallback paths, and stop-guard traces. Updated tests so no-tool model text is surfaced directly.

title: Remove default ReAct turn cap
description: Match Claude Code behavior: Resume Agent should default to an unbounded ReAct loop and stop only on natural/no-tool response or system stop conditions; explicit max_iterations remains optional.
close_reason: Removed ResumeAgent default max_iterations=6; runtime now runs unbounded by default and only enforces explicit max_iterations. Added regression coverage beyond six tool turns.

title: Make frontend.sh tolerate sh invocation
description: User ran sh frontend.sh and hit Bash process substitution syntax error. Re-exec under Bash when invoked by sh.
close_reason: frontend.sh now re-execs under Bash when invoked by sh and avoids process substitution in the logging pipeline.

title: Split backend terminal and file log sinks
description: Make local backend terminal logs colorized while keeping backend/logs/backend.log plain text without ANSI color codes. Avoid tee mirroring a single stream; configure separate terminal and file sinks.
close_reason: Configured separate log sinks: colorized terminal output and plain backend log file output, with regression coverage for ANSI-free file logs.

title: Move fake edit detection out of regex-only validator
description: Refactor resume fake-edit stop validation to use structured facts from the stop context. Block when no real tool result occurred in the relevant turn/run but the assistant claims completion or describes pending edits. Avoid growing broad regex lists in the runtime; keep minimal text heuristics only as a hook implementation detail.
close_reason: Resume fake-edit detection now uses structured stop context: completion claims are blocked only when no real tool result exists, with regression coverage for overview simplification claims.

title: Introduce structured resume stop context
description: Create a StopHookContext-like object for PiAgentRuntime stop validators. Include agent, messages for the current loop, assistant_message, text_deltas, executed tools for this user run, current turn tool calls/results, run_id, and stream state. This should mirror Claude Code's handleStopHooks context shape instead of passing only agent + assistant_message.
close_reason: Added structured StopHookContext for PiAgentRuntime validators, carrying run/messages/assistant/text/tool/state context while preserving existing behavior.

title: Align resume stop handling with Claude Code stop hooks
description: Refactor resume agent stop handling to match Claude Code more closely: runtime owns generic stop-hook control flow; business-specific validators operate on a structured stop context and return block/pass without expanding regex inside the main loop.
close_reason: All child beads are closed. Resume stop handling now uses structured stop context, structured stop results, hidden feedback metadata, fact-based fake edit detection, observability, and regression coverage for no-tool overview completion claims.

title: Catch completed overview simplification without tool call
description: Backend log run 82fb2ec3 returned tool_call_count=0 for user input 继续啊 but streamed 已完成 Deep Research Agent 项目 overview 精简. Extend resume stop validator to block completion claims for 精简/overview when no tool call exists.
close_reason: Covered by test_optimize_retries_completed_overview_claim_without_tool; no-tool overview completion claims are blocked and retried through the stop validator.

title: Catch shorthand unrealized resume edit stop text
description: Latest backend log run ea2fad29 returned no tool_call but streamed shorthand action headings like 继续精简另一条/最后一条. Extend stop-turn validator and add regression coverage.
close_reason: Implemented Claude Code style stop validator pipeline and covered shorthand unrealized edit headings from backend log run ea2fad29.

title: Add resume agent stop-turn validator
description: Implement a Claude Code style stop boundary validator for resume agent final assistant turns: when a no-tool response still contains action headings like continuing to edit bullets, hide it, log it, retry once with protocol feedback, and fall back to deterministic text if still invalid.
close_reason: Implemented Claude Code style no-tool stop validator for unrealized resume edit action headings, with hidden feedback retry and deterministic fallback.

title: Enforce structured resume tool-call truth
description: Align resume agent with Claude Code/Pi/Kimi tool-call semantics: only structured tool_call counts as mutation, hide assistant preamble text on tool-call turns, add deterministic fallback for invalid no-tool mutation claims after one protocol retry, and keep tool schemas focused on parameters.
close_reason: Enforced structured tool-call truth semantics, hid tool-call preambles, added deterministic invalid-turn fallback, and verified backend tests.

title: Add stop guard for fake resume mutation claims
description: Add a Claude Code-style stop guard to the resume ReAct loop: when the model stops without any tool call but claims it added/updated/split resume bullets, inject an internal correction and continue instead of surfacing the fake completion.
close_reason: Implemented Claude Code-style stop guard for fake mutation claims and covered sync/stream regressions.

title: Refactor resume runtime to explicit ReAct loop
description: Replace the resume agent runtime's black-box pi-agent-core loop path with a local Claude Code-style ReAct loop: stream one assistant response, execute/confirm at most one tool call, append the tool result to messages, then continue until the model stops or max iterations is reached.
close_reason: Refactored resume runtime to an explicit local ReAct loop and verified full backend tests.

title: Add confirmation flow observability
description: Instrument resume-agent tool_pending SSE emission and frontend confirmTool source so repeated or unexpected resume tool confirmations can be diagnosed from logs.
close_reason: Added confirmation flow observability and verified backend/frontend type checks.

title: Slim resume system prompt to Claude Code style
description: Rewrite resume_agent system.md so the stable system prompt is thin and policy-focused, remove the visible available-tools mirror, and keep tool-specific guidance in API tool schemas.
close_reason: Slimmed resume system prompt to stable policy text, removed visible tool mirror, and kept tool details in API schemas.

title: Refactor resume agent tool prompts like Claude Code
description: Move resume-agent tool usage guidance toward the Claude Code pattern: stable system prompt rules stay in system prompt, per-tool usage guidance lives near tool definitions, runtime passes active API tools each round, and model decides when to call tools without first-round business limits.
close_reason: Implemented Claude Code-style tool prompt refactor: stable system prompt, per-tool schema guidance, active API tools unchanged, model decides tool use.

title: Use Kimi-style prompt variables
description: Refactor backend prompt rendering to match Kimi CLI style: system prompt templates use ${VAR} placeholders instead of {{ VAR }}, while tool schemas remain passed natively via provider tools.
acceptance_criteria: Resume agent system.md uses ${...} placeholders for prompt variables and no {{...}} placeholders; prompt loader renders ${...} with StrictUndefined; existing prompt rendering tests pass; full backend pytest and basedpyright pass.
close_reason: Refactored prompt loader to Kimi-style ${...} variables, updated resume_agent/system.md placeholders, and kept tools passed natively. Focused tests, basedpyright, and full backend pytest passed.

title: Move resume prompt tool conditionals into Python
description: Refactor ResumeAgent prompt construction to be closer to Pi Agent: compute tool-specific rules/protocol strings in Python from active tool names and keep system.md as a clean final prompt template without Jinja conditionals.
acceptance_criteria: system.md contains no Jinja if/endif control blocks for tool availability; rendered prompt still mirrors active tools and read_only profile omits edit protocol; focused backend tests, full backend pytest, and basedpyright pass.
close_reason: Moved tool availability conditionals out of system.md and into Python prompt context generation. system.md now uses clean tool_usage_rules/tool_protocol placeholders, rendered from active tools. Focused tests, basedpyright, and full backend pytest passed.

title: Mirror active tools in resume agent prompt
description: Refactor ResumeAgent prompt construction to match Pi agent style: derive a concise available-tools section from the same active tool schemas passed to the model, so the system prompt and provider tools stay in sync.
acceptance_criteria: Rendered system prompt includes a concise available tools section generated from active tool schemas; prompt section updates when active tool profile changes; OpenRouter tools remain passed as native tool schemas; focused backend tests pass.
close_reason: Refactored ResumeAgent prompt construction to mirror Pi active tools: available tool summaries and tool protocol now derive from the actual profiled schemas passed to the model. Added read_only profile coverage, focused runtime tests, full backend pytest, and basedpyright verification.

title: Normalize AI markdown indentation
description: Prevent ordinary AI assistant text from rendering as gray Markdown code blocks when the model emits accidental four-space indentation. Add frontend markdown normalization and a prompt guard against indented prose.
acceptance_criteria: Streaming and persisted AI messages strip accidental leading 4-space/tab indentation outside fenced code blocks; real fenced code remains intact; focused frontend checks pass.
close_reason: Normalized AI markdown rendering for accidental indented prose, preserved fenced code blocks, and added a prompt guard against indented ordinary replies. Frontend type-check and focused normalization checks passed.

title: Use ReAct one-tool-per-turn runtime
description: User wants standard ReAct behavior: each model turn may call one tool, the tool result is fed back, then the model continues speaking or decides to call another tool. Remove backend first_round_business_tool_limit skip behavior and prevent multi-tool batches from executing in one model turn.
acceptance_criteria: No runtime path emits first_round_business_tool_limit; a model response with multiple tool calls executes one tool then loops with the result; generate_job_match_summary does not block a later update_bullet; focused tests and basedpyright pass.
close_reason: Implemented ReAct one-tool-per-model-turn runtime: removed first_round_business_tool_limit skip path, pruned multi-tool assistant responses to the first tool call, and let confirmation results feed back to the model instead of stopping the run. Full backend pytest and basedpyright passed.

title: Send explicit OpenRouter reasoning off
description: Ensure ResumeAgent OpenRouter chat/completions requests explicitly disable provider reasoning so first-token latency is not inflated by default hidden reasoning.
acceptance_criteria: OpenRouter request body includes reasoning effort none; focused backend test covers the request body.
close_reason: Implemented explicit OpenRouter reasoning off and covered request body with a focused test.

title: Remove heuristic tool profile selection
description: User wants tool usage to be decided by the model, not backend keyword heuristics. Remove read_only/job_match routing so each resume-agent request exposes the normal tool set and update tests accordingly.
close_reason: Removed backend keyword-based read_only/job_match tool routing. Resume Agent now defaults to the full resume tool set for every request so the model decides whether to call tools. Full backend pytest and basedpyright passed.

title: Disable OpenRouter first-token timeout by default
description: User wants to remove the 45 second first-token timeout. Make OPENROUTER_FIRST_TOKEN_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=0 disable the stage timeout and update the default/example so slow provider responses can continue waiting for the normal read timeout.
close_reason: OPENROUTER_FIRST_TOKEN_TIMEOUT_SECONDS now defaults to 0, which disables the first-token stage timeout while preserving the normal OpenRouter read timeout. Focused pytest and basedpyright passed.

title: Instrument OpenRouter stream latency
description: Add provider-level diagnostics for slow Resume Agent responses. Acceptance: log OpenRouter stream stages (request start, headers, first SSE line, first text/tool delta, done/error), enforce configurable first-event and first-token timeout, suppress repeated read-only tool-call detected noise, and run focused tests/type checks.
close_reason: OpenRouter stream now logs request/header/SSE/text/tool/done/error stages, configurable first-event/token timeouts are enforced, repeated unexpected read-only tool calls are suppressed, and backend tests plus basedpyright pass.

title: Remove observability stack and rely on logs
description: Objective: delete the local observability stack and replace its usage with local log-based diagnostics. Acceptance: remove Docker/Grafana/Loki/Prometheus/Tempo/OTel stack files and runtime integrations; remove agent LogQL/PromQL tools; keep request and agent diagnostics in backend logs; update docs and launcher output to point to logs; run focused backend tests/type checks.
close_reason: Removed local observability stack and external observer integrations; diagnostics now rely on request, DB, and agent logs. Verified with full backend pytest and basedpyright.

title: 补齐 Resume Agent 性能观测字段
description: 在现有本地观测栈和 runtime trace 上补充 agent 性能字段，记录 tool_profile、工具数量、prompt_chars、message_count、首 token 延迟、OpenRouter usage 和工具确认等待耗时。目标是让后续优化可量化。
acceptance_criteria: agent.trace.llm.request/response 或等价事件包含新增字段；本地日志或指标能对比优化前后；不改变用户可见 SSE 协议。
close_reason: Implemented Resume Agent runtime profile, observability, confirmation hook, session, conversion, OpenRouter adapter, and context compaction slice; verified with backend full pytest and basedpyright.

title: 按意图收敛 Resume Agent 工具集
description: 基于 Pi Agent active tools 思路，为简历 Agent 增加 tool profile：只读问答、简历编辑、JD 匹配、观测诊断分别只暴露必要工具。目标是减少每轮工具 schema 体积、降低误调用、改善首包延迟。
acceptance_criteria: 同一条只读问题的 LLM 请求工具数量明显下降；agent.trace.llm.request 记录 tool_profile；现有工具确认和简历保存行为不回归。
close_reason: Implemented Resume Agent runtime profile, observability, confirmation hook, session, conversion, OpenRouter adapter, and context compaction slice; verified with backend full pytest and basedpyright.

title: Upgrade Beads AGENTS integration block
description: Why: current AGENTS.md uses the old bd setup codex block and does not statically include session completion rules. What: replace it with the bd integration minimal block that requires git push before work is complete.
close_reason: Completed: replaced old bd setup codex block with Beads integration minimal block including mandatory session completion and push rules.

title: Limit Resume Agent first optimization to one confirmable change
description: Why: first JD-based optimization currently lets the model plan and emit many tool calls before the user sees progress, causing a long 'thinking' period. What: make the first optimization round produce one fast, confirmable diff before continuing, with regression coverage.
close_reason: Completed: limited streaming first round to one confirmable business tool, tightened prompt, reduced Resume Agent max_tokens, and verified tests.

title: paused session 超时自动 fail 防止永久挂起
description: confirmation_manager 是进程内状态，服务重启后等待确认的 session 永远处于 paused 状态无法自动清理。需要：1) 给 paused session 设置超时时间（如 10 分钟）；2) 后台 sweeper 定期扫描超时 paused session 并将其标记为 failed；3) 重启时对所有残留 paused session 执行同样清理。防止 DB 中积压僵尸 session。
close_reason: 已实现 session_sweeper.py + main.py startup/shutdown 集成，超时 paused session 自动 fail，60s 轮询，4 tests 通过

title: Improve Resume Agent tool-call reliability
description: Why: Resume Agent must run smoothly and call resume tools correctly before deeper product work. What: add a focused regression test around tool-call prompting/selection and patch the smallest prompt or service seam needed so the agent consistently produces confirmable resume diffs.
close_reason: Completed: added Resume Agent tool argument normalization, prompt tool-call protocol, smoke mutation detection, and verified backend tests plus real model smoke.

title: 修复编辑页 mount 时的 console.error：找出哪个 API 调用失败并修复根因
description:
attached_molecule: cr-wisp-n8h0
attached_formula: mol-polecat-work
attached_at: 2026-05-14T01:05:13Z
attached_vars: ["base_branch=main"]
dispatched_by: mayor
convoy_id: hq-cv-64k26
formula_vars: base_branch=main

编辑页（/resume/[id]/edit）加载时立刻出现 console.error，错误来自 httpClient.ts:44，说明某个 handleApiResponse 调用返回了非字符串的 detail（对象或数组）。候选是 loadChatHistory 调用的 GET /api/resumes/{id}/chat-messages。请：1. 确认是哪个接口失败；2. 找出为什么失败；3. 修复根因。本地项目在 /Users/psx849261680/Desktop/projects/chat-resume。
notes: Confirmed failure source from local backend logs: 2026-05-14T00:53:03Z recorded GET /api/resumes/NaN/chat-messages and GET /api/resumes/NaN, both 422. Root cause is edit page passing an invalid route id through parseInt into resume/chat APIs. Fix validates params.id before passing it to editor/chat hooks and redirects authenticated invalid routes to dashboard. Added e2e coverage that /zh/resume/NaN/edit makes no /api/resumes/NaN requests.
close_reason: Merged in cr-wisp-e1u

title: Split frontend terminal and file logs
description: Make frontend startup logging match backend: colored terminal output and plain frontend.log file output.
close_reason: Implemented frontend terminal/file log split

title: Add stop preventContinuation and retry policy
description: Replace the hard-coded one-retry stop guard with an explicit stop hook result model: pass, block-with-feedback, preventContinuation. Preserve a loop guard to avoid infinite retries, but make the policy visible and testable rather than embedded in _can_retry_stop_hook_block only.
close_reason: Stop validators now return a structured result model with pass/block/prevent_continuation outcomes and an explicit retry limit policy.

title: Add Claude Code style stop hook observability
description: Extend stop guard tracing to include hook_name, hook_count, duration_ms, blocked/pass/preventContinuation outcome, response preview, feedback preview, retry count, and whether fallback was emitted. Goal: logs should explain exactly why a natural stop was accepted or blocked.
close_reason: Stop hook tracing now records pass/block/fallback/prevent outcomes with hook_count, duration_ms, feedback preview, retry count, and fallback flags.

title: Represent stop feedback as hidden meta message
description: Make stop validator blocking feedback semantically hidden like Claude Code's createUserMessage({ isMeta: true }). If pi-agent-core lacks meta messages, add an internal wrapper/flag so Stop hook feedback is never rendered as user-visible conversation and is distinguishable in traces.
close_reason: Stop hook feedback messages now carry hidden_from_ui/stop_hook_feedback metadata while remaining visible to the LLM conversion path.

title: Show same backend logs in terminal and file
description: Make backend.sh display the same log stream in the terminal that it writes to backend/logs/backend.log. Remove the default terminal filtering so local debugging has one consistent view.
close_reason: backend.sh now sends uvicorn output through tee only, so terminal output and backend/logs/backend.log receive the same stream. Verified by restart and comparing terminal capture with log tail.

title: Reduce agent chunk log noise
description: Default Agent logs should be human-readable: stop emitting every streaming intermediate chunk at INFO. Keep stage-level request/response/tool/run logs, add an opt-in setting for chunk-level diagnostics, and verify with focused backend tests.
close_reason: Chunk-level agent trace logs now require AGENT_TRACE_CHUNK_LOG_ENABLED=true. Default logs keep stage-level request/response/tool/run events. Verified focused pytest, basedpyright, and restarted backend with text logs.

title: Default backend logs to text format
description: Change the local backend startup defaults so backend/logs/backend.log is human-readable text by default. Acceptance: backend.sh defaults LOG_FORMAT=text, .env.example matches the local default, and the backend log file shows text-format app.ready output after restart.
close_reason: backend.sh and backend/.env.example now default LOG_FORMAT=text; restarted backend and verified backend/logs/backend.log contains text-format app.ready output.

title: 将工具确认流程抽象为 hook 语义
description: 参考 Pi Agent beforeToolCall/afterToolCall/terminate，将当前 preview、等待确认、确认后终止文本等逻辑从工具执行包装层拆出，形成可测试的权限与确认边界，同时保留现有用户体验。
acceptance_criteria: 确认策略与工具实际执行职责分离；确认、拒绝、终止当前轮次均有单测；现有工具确认 UI 和简历保存不回归。
close_reason: Implemented Resume Agent runtime profile, observability, confirmation hook, session, conversion, OpenRouter adapter, and context compaction slice; verified with backend full pytest and basedpyright.

title: 设计业务版 ResumeAgentSession
description: 参考 Pi AgentSession 的长期状态层，但只保留简历产品需要的能力：LLM transcript、当前 tool profile、模型配置、确认中的 tool call、usage、摘要边界。复用现有 DB session/store，不引入 coding-agent 文件会话全套。
acceptance_criteria: 形成可实现的 ResumeAgentSession 最小接口；能从持久化数据重建下一轮 LLM 上下文；不破坏现有 SSE replay 和工具确认恢复。
close_reason: Implemented Resume Agent runtime profile, observability, confirmation hook, session, conversion, OpenRouter adapter, and context compaction slice; verified with backend full pytest and basedpyright.

title: 为 Pi runtime 建立显式 convert_to_llm 边界
description: 参考 Pi Agent 的 AgentMessage 到 LLM Message 转换边界，替换当前透传式 convert_to_llm，明确哪些消息进入模型，哪些只用于 UI、审计或恢复。为后续摘要、确认消息和观测结果入上下文打基础。
acceptance_criteria: PiAgentRuntime 使用独立转换函数；转换函数覆盖 user/assistant/toolResult 和内部消息过滤；相关单测锁定不会把 internal_only/UI 事件发送给 LLM。
close_reason: Implemented Resume Agent runtime profile, observability, confirmation hook, session, conversion, OpenRouter adapter, and context compaction slice; verified with backend full pytest and basedpyright.

title: 补齐安全与质量基线文档
description: Why: docs/SECURITY.md 和 docs/QUALITY_SCORE.md 仍是占位内容，缺少当前项目可执行的安全配置清单、认证授权模型、数据保留说明和质量基线。 What: 基于当前仓库代码和真实验证命令更新两个文档，不触碰正在进行的 SSE 后端改动。
close_reason: Completed: updated docs/SECURITY.md with security/config/auth/data-retention/vendor checklist and docs/QUALITY_SCORE.md with current quality baseline plus verified backend/frontend gates.

title: Fix frontend hydration warning and missing browser icons
description: The /zh page reports a React hydration attribute mismatch caused by browser-injected html attributes, and requests for favicon/apple-touch icons return 404. Add the smallest frontend fix and verify the route no longer reports these local issues.
close_reason: Fixed html hydration warning from browser-injected attributes and added favicon/apple-touch static assets; verified type-check, build, curl, and Playwright hydration probe.

title: OpenRouter 调用添加 circuit breaker
description: OpenRouter 持续故障时，每个请求都会等到 read timeout（90s），会积压连接，asyncio task 不断增长。需要在 pi_agent_openrouter.py 中引入 circuit breaker：连续失败 N 次后进入 open 状态，直接返回错误不再发出请求；经过冷却期后进入 half-open 探测状态；成功后恢复 closed。
close_reason: Completed: added OpenRouter circuit breaker with fast-fail open state, cooldown probe, success reset, config knobs, and retry regression tests.

title: Refinery Patrol
description: Merge queue processor patrol loop with verification gates.
close_reason: Closed automatic patrol molecules; not active project work

title: Witness Patrol
description: Per-rig worker monitor patrol loop with progressive nudging.
close_reason: Closed automatic patrol molecules; not active project work

title: Deacon Patrol
description: Mayor's daemon patrol loop for handling callbacks, health checks, and cleanup.
close_reason: Closed automatic patrol molecules; not active project work

title: 拆分 OpenRouter provider 配置层
description: 参考 Pi SDK/session 构造方式，将 OpenRouter 的模型选择、auth、retry、reasoning/thinking 配置、payload/response hook 从业务 runtime 中拆出，为后续模型降级和 provider 对比留下清晰边界。
acceptance_criteria: PiAgentRuntime 不直接散落 provider 配置细节；OpenRouter adapter 有独立配置入口；现有 OPENROUTER_MODEL 和 reasoning 配置保持兼容；streaming 错误处理不回归。
close_reason: Implemented Resume Agent runtime profile, observability, confirmation hook, session, conversion, OpenRouter adapter, and context compaction slice; verified with backend full pytest and basedpyright.

title: 实现简历上下文摘要与压缩机制
description: 参考 Pi Agent compaction，但先做简历产品专用版本：用当前简历结构摘要、已确认 diff summary、最近对话替代每轮全量简历 JSON，逐步降低长会话 token 成本和上下文退化。
acceptance_criteria: 长会话达到阈值后能生成并复用摘要；摘要保留已确认修改和关键 JD/简历事实；普通短会话行为不变化；有测试覆盖摘要边界。
close_reason: Implemented Resume Agent runtime profile, observability, confirmation hook, session, conversion, OpenRouter adapter, and context compaction slice; verified with backend full pytest and basedpyright.

title: SSE 流式响应支持断点续传 event cursor
description: 当前 SSE 连接断开后整个流丢失，前端必须重新发消息。需要：1) 每个 SSE 事件附加单调递增 event_id；2) 前端重连时携带 Last-Event-ID header；3) 服务端根据 cursor 从 session event log 中回放已发出但客户端未收到的事件。依赖 AgentSessionStore 中已有的事件持久化机制。
close_reason: Completed: added SSE event ids, persisted public stream events, Last-Event-ID replay, and frontend cursor handling with type/backend regression coverage.
